enforcedBlocker: single-task benchmark fragility cannot be promoted without independent recurrence or severe bounded effect
materialChangeRequired: new independent task family with group/time/entity split and recurrence support

enforcedBlocker: claims whose strongest rival remains maturity, source family, documentation, metric, or cadence are blocked
materialChangeRequired: explicit rival-discriminating design where candidate and rival make different predictions

enforcedBlocker: baseline domination is an early pre-execution death cause, not a late promotion caveat
materialChangeRequired: predeclared reason that comparable null/simple baseline should not dominate

enforcedBlocker: source-family recurrence and documented benchmark-family behavior are not novelty
materialChangeRequired: external claim or public object whose value is not absorbed by source family documentation

enforcedBlocker: formal challenge mining pauses unless a human-curated sharp falsifier or concrete high-value claim is supplied
materialChangeRequired: exact external claim, falsifier, public object, and nonstandard witness value

enforcedBlocker: formal witness routes cannot execute when no concrete witness/refutation oracle exists
materialChangeRequired: validatable certificate or checked counterexample that scopes a rival

enforcedBlocker: standard clique, coloring, SAT=yes, or model=yes certificates do not support discovery by themselves
materialChangeRequired: nonstandard witness or refutation whose value is not a textbook certificate

enforcedBlocker: Product runtime replay and manifest replay cannot replace raw scientific or independent source replay
materialChangeRequired: public raw inputs, source objects, or deterministic reconstruction sufficient for external replay

enforcedBlocker: benchmark/data claims require group, time, or entity split support before candidate birth
materialChangeRequired: documented group/time/entity split manifest and recurrence/holdout evidence
